__comment__: This file was automatically created by mcresources
name: Chemical Ingredients

pages.text: Not all materials in engineer- ing are as straightforward as wood, stone and various metals. A basic understanding of chemical processes is essential to appreciate the breadth of materials available to you.
$(thing)Saltpeter$() is an alkali salt found in the TFC world and processed in a $(l:mechanics/quern)Quern$().
$(thing)Saltpeter$() is used as a catalyst in the creation of $(thing)Biodiesel$(), and can be used to craft $(thing)Fertilizer$() as shown above.
$(thing)Sulfur$() is found in the TFC world and processed in a $(l:mechanics/quern)Quern$().
Mixing $(thing)Saltpeter$(), $(thing)Sulfur$() and $(thing)Charcoal$() allows for the creation of $(thing)Gunpowder$(), a far more scientific process than looting it from slain monsters.
